title: × halimiocistus lasiocalycinus
intro: × Halimiocistus lasiocalycinus, also known as the hybrid halimocistus, is a type of flowering shrub that belongs to the family Cistaceae. It is a cross between the two species Cistus ladanum and Halimocistus judaeus, and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat wounds and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been traditionally used to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and improve skin health, making it beneficial for treating conditions such as acne, eczema, and dermatitis. × Halimiocistus lasiocalycinus can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
